document.title: XIMA Assessment v1.1 — Technical White Paper

computational_power.definition: Capacity to decompose complex data, identify patterns, apply analytical reasoning, and evaluate solutions systematically.
computational_power.boundary: Does not measure raw intelligence, IQ, or mathematical ability in isolation.

communication.definition: Ability to adapt messaging to diverse audiences, navigate interpersonal dynamics, and achieve alignment through structured dialogue.
communication.boundary: Does not measure linguistic fluency, extroversion, or social desirability.

knowledge.definition: Capacity for evidence evaluation, belief updating under uncertainty, and synthesis of information from multiple sources.
knowledge.boundary: Does not measure domain-specific expertise or factual recall.

creativity.definition: Ability to generate novel solutions under real constraints, reframe problems, and navigate trade-offs between innovation and feasibility.
creativity.boundary: Does not measure artistic talent or divergent thinking in isolation.

drive.definition: Learning behaviour under friction — capacity to identify personal skill gaps, design corrective strategies, and sustain deliberate practice. Measured as Growth Velocity.
drive.boundary: Does not measure static motivation, grit rhetoric, or self-reported ambition.

assessment_structure.pillar_mapping: Cyclic: q1→CP, q2→Comm, q3→Know, q4→Crea, q5→Drive, q6→CP, ..., q21→CP

scoring.pillar_aggregation: Mean of raw scores per pillar, scaled to 0-100

ximatar_assignment.method: Euclidean distance to 12 canonical prototype vectors
ximatar_assignment.tie_resolution: Lowest index in prototype list wins (deterministic)

freeze_enforcement.scope: assessmentSets subtree per locale (EN, IT, ES)
freeze_enforcement.enforcement: Fatal console error at startup if runtime hash diverges from frozen baseline
version_bump_procedure: 3. Copy the logged hashes into ASSESSMENT_FREEZE_HASHES
4. Commit with message: 'chore: bump assessment freeze to v1.2'

gdpr_compliance.article_22_statement: XIMA Assessment is a decision-support tool and does not produce automated legally binding decisions under Article 22 GDPR.
